title: DfE Update:  22 October 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Action R03 submission: estimated student numbers   Action Apprenticeships care leavers’ bursary   Information Foundation apprenticeships – additional funding and exemptions to age limits   Information Level 7 (postgraduate level) apprenticeships – additional funding and exemptions to age limits   Information 16 to 19 and adult revenue funding allocations for 2025 to 2026   Information Update to college financial handbook about special severance pay   Information Updated list of T Level qualifications, learning aim references and end dates   Reminder Submit your final Individualised Learning Record return     Latest information for academies     Article Title     Action R03 submission: estimated student numbers   Action Apprenticeships care leavers’ bursary   Information Update to academy trust handbook about special severance pay   Information Updated list of T Level qualifications, learning aim references and end dates   Information PE and sport premium allocations and conditions of grant for 2025 to 2026 academic year   Information Land and buildings collection tool 2025   Information Foundation apprenticeships – additional funding and exemptions to age limits   Information Level 7 (postgraduate level) apprenticeships – additional funding and exemptions to age limits   Reminder Submit your autumn school census for 2025   Reminder Submit your final Individualised Learning Record return   Your feedback Opportunity to take part in an early career teachers funding survey   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return   Events and webinars Financial Benchmarking and Insights Tool overview   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement members only - mock trial     Latest information for local authorities     Article Title        Action R03 submission: estimated student numbers   Action Apprenticeships care leavers’ bursary   Information Updated list of T Level qualifications, learning aim references and end dates   Information Update on early years 2025 autumn term data collection   Information PE and sport premium allocations and conditions of grant for 2025 to 2026 academic year   Information Foundation apprenticeships – additional funding and exemptions to age limits   Information Level 7 (postgraduate level) apprenticeships – additional funding and exemptions to age limits   Reminder Submit your autumn school census for 2025   Your feedback Opportunity to take part in an early career teachers funding survey   Events and webinars Financial Benchmarking and Insights Tool overview   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement members only -
